# Naming Conventions

## Prefix Rule
ALL custom elements MUST use `Usr` prefix (or your registered Creatio Marketplace vendor prefix).

## Entity Schemas

| Element | Pattern | Example |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Entity name | `Usr` + PascalCase noun | `UsrVacationRequest` |
| Column name | `Usr` + PascalCase | `UsrStartDate` |
| Lookup entity | `Usr` + PascalCase | `UsrVacationStatus` |
| Lookup column | `Usr` + Referenced entity | `UsrVacationStatus` → creates `UsrVacationStatusId` FK |

## Client Module Schemas

| Element | Pattern | Example |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Form page | `{Entity}_FormPage` | `UsrVacationRequest_FormPage` |
| Section page | `{Entity}_ListPage` | `UsrVacationRequest_ListPage` |
| Replacing module | Same name as target | `ContactPageV2` (in your package) |
| Mini page | `{Entity}_MiniPage` | `UsrVacationRequest_MiniPage` |

## viewConfigDiff Element Names

| Element | Pattern | Example |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Input field | `Usr{Column}Input` | `UsrNameInput` |
| ComboBox | `Usr{Column}ComboBox` | `UsrStatusComboBox` |
| Container | `Usr{Purpose}Container` | `UsrGeneralInfoContainer` |
| Button | `Usr{Action}Button` | `UsrCalculateButton` |
| Tab | `Usr{Name}Tab` | `UsrDetailsTab` |
| DataGrid | `Usr{Entity}Grid` | `UsrOrderLinesGrid` |

## ViewModel Attributes

| Element | Pattern | Example |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Visibility flag | `Is{Element}Visible` | `IsReasonVisible` |
| Readonly flag | `Is{Element}Locked` | `IsFormLocked` |
| Computed value | `Calculated{Name}` | `CalculatedTotal` |

## Handler Requests

| Element | Pattern | Example |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Custom request | `usr.{Action}Request` | `usr.CalculateTotalRequest` |
| System requests | `crt.{Name}Request` | `crt.SaveRecordRequest` |

## Package Naming

| Element | Pattern | Example |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Package name | `Usr{AppName}` | `UsrVacationManagement` |
| Package version | `X.Y.Z` | `1.0.0` |

## SQL Objects

| Element | Pattern | Example |
|---------|---------|---------|
| View | `Usr{Purpose}View` | `UsrActiveVacationsView` |
| Stored procedure | `Usr{Action}` | `UsrCalculateBalance` |

## What NOT to Name

```
BAD:  VacationRequest         → missing prefix
BAD:  usr_vacation_request    → snake_case, lowercase prefix
BAD:  USR_VACATION            → SCREAMING_CASE
BAD:  usrVacationRequest      → camelCase prefix
GOOD: UsrVacationRequest      → PascalCase with Usr prefix
```

## Preinstalled Names — Never Use

Never create custom schemas with names that match preinstalled schemas:
- `Contact`, `Account`, `Activity`, `Order` — these exist already
- Instead: `UsrCustomContact`, or use REPLACING schema to extend existing
